task_objective: Optimize the fuzzy matching loop in LudusaviStateStore.isTracked by removing the O(N) Array.from() Set allocation and replacing it with direct Set iteration.
design_decisions: Used direct for...of loop on this.snapshot.trackedNames Set instead of converting to an array first via Array.from().
Eliminated O(N) allocation overhead per call, keeping memory overhead at O(1).
Preserved identical fuzzy substring matching criteria (length > 4, bidirectional includes).

results.red_test: test_frontend_state_store_optimization_no_array_from_in_loop failed because Array.from was present in ludusaviState.tsx
